prompt: Build a sales dashboard for Q1 with a KPI for total revenue and a bar chart of revenue by region.
Create an executive dashboard showing three KPIs (users, revenue, churn) and a line chart of monthly signups.
Design a marketing dashboard with a KPI card for conversion rate and a chart comparing channels.
Show an operations overview: a KPI for open tickets and a bar chart of tickets by priority.
Compare product A and product B across price, rating, and units sold using a chart.
Show a year-over-year comparison of quarterly revenue as a grouped bar chart.
Compare regional performance (EU, NA, APAC) with a chart and a short summary card.
Visualize plan tiers (Free, Pro, Enterprise) feature adoption as a chart.
Present the current monthly recurring revenue as a single KPI with an up trend.
Show net promoter score as a KPI card with the delta versus last month.
Display total active users as a KPI with unit 'users' and a downward trend.
Summarize gross margin as a KPI card in percent.
Produce a data table of the top 10 customers with columns name, region, and total spend.
Show a table of monthly expenses by category with a truncated note if more than 20 rows.
Render a report table of open support tickets with columns id, subject, priority, status.
Create a tabular breakdown of revenue by product line and quarter.
Display a map of store locations across Spain with a title and a layer for stores.
Show a map view of delivery hubs in Europe with markers and a description.
Write a short quarterly report with a title, an intro section, a results section with a chart, and a summary.
Compose an infographic titled 'Annual Overview' with a highlights section of KPIs and a trends section with a chart.
Build an infographic summarizing project health: a KPI row and a timeline of milestones.
Create a product launch infographic with a hero card, KPI metrics, and a comparison chart.
